allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, LastWriteTime, Length)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $img = [System.Windows.Forms.Clipboard]::GetImage\(\); if \($img\) { $path = "C:\\Users\\SULTAN1\\OneDrive - Umm Al-Qura University\\سطح المكتب\\تباين\\Tabayun_FrontEnd\\public\\image\\skyline.png"; $img.Save\($path, [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); Write-Output "SAVED: $path \($\(\($img\).Width\)x$\(\($img\).Height\)\)"; } else { Write-Output "NO_IMAGE_IN_CLIPBOARD" })

PowerShell($cb = Get-Clipboard -Format FileDropList -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cb\) { $cb | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ } } else { Write-Output "NO_FILES_IN_CLIPBOARD" }; Write-Output "---"; Get-Clipboard -Format Text -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5)

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\SULTAN1\\Downloads\\saudi_landmarks_line_art_transparent.png"; $dest = "C:\\Users\\SULTAN1\\OneDrive - Umm Al-Qura University\\سطح المكتب\\تباين\\Tabayun_FrontEnd\\public\\image\\skyline.png"; Copy-Item -Path $src -Destination $dest -Force; if \(Test-Path $dest\) { $f = Get-Item $dest; Write-Output "SAVED: $\($f.FullName\) - $\([math]::Round\($f.Length/1KB,1\)\) KB" } else { Write-Output "FAILED" })
